TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kersti_Kaljulaid, title = Kersti_Kaljulaid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kersti_Kaljulaid} }

S.FORM: I 1969 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Kersti Kaljulaid , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Estonia anini i ci Kersti Kaljulaid, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 10 a romi'ad. Her presidential term ended on 11 October 2021.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i k…ôrsti ka…ĺjo~u~u…ĺai…¨~…ģ , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ôsto~unia anini i ¶i k…ôrsti ka…ĺjo~u~u…ĺai…¨~…ģ, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. ńß…ôr pr…ôsi…¨~…ģ…ôntia…ĺ t…ôrm …ôn…¨~…ģ…ô…¨~…ģ o~un ** o~u ¶to~ub~b~v…ôr ****.
S.FORM: I 1969 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Kersti Kaljulaid , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Estonia anini i ci Kersti Kaljulaid, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 10 a romi'ad. Her presidential term ended on 11 October 2021.
